description_long: This shotgun features a long, slender barrel with a matte black finish, complemented by a wooden stock and fore-end that display a rich, dark brown coloration. The barrel is extended and appears to be a single tube, with no visible ribbing or venting along its length. The receiver is compact and metallic, with a mounted scope or sighting device on top, suggesting it is designed for precision shooting. The stock is a traditional full stock, ergonomically shaped for shoulder support, and the trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger. The fore-end is smooth and matches the wood grain of the stock, while the overall construction suggests a robust and functional design. Metal components dominate the build, with wood accents providing both aesthetic and practical grip surfaces.
description: A long-barreled shotgun with a matte black finish, wooden full stock, and a mounted scope, featuring a rounded trigger guard and smooth wooden fore-end.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, wooden stock, and mounted scope.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the stock and barrel details, with the scope and trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and scope.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and unvented with no visible ribbing
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
